top_signals.title: Micron CEO: Customers driving hard bargain on price contributed to memory shortage
top_signals.summary: Micron CEO Sanjay Mehrotra said years of aggressive pricing pressure left the memory industry underinvested, contributing to today's supply shortages.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Microsoft fixes GIF functionality in the Windows Emoji Panel
top_signals.summary: Microsoft has fixed the GIF functionality in the Emoji Panel for Windows 11 and Windows Server users after the provider shut down its service. [...]
